title_en: 【函館記念】オニャンコポン メンタル整えて 小島師「状態は前走よりいい」
description: オニャンコポンは水曜に函館入り。木曜朝は角馬場で体をほぐして、体調を整えた。 11日に美浦Wコースで4F58秒2〜1F12秒3をマークして以降、プール調教など軽めの調整が続いている。小島師は「メンタルが少しデリケート。真面目な馬で走らなきゃ、と思ってしまうから我慢させているところ。時計は出る馬だけど、出していない分、プールで内面的な部分をつくった」と説明。「状態は前走よりいいと思う」と愛馬の状態を伝えた。

description: チャックネイトはメンバー唯一の木曜追い。Wコースを単走で伸び伸びと駆け抜けた。時計は4F57秒7〜1F13秒3(馬なり)。 函館は24年の当レース(6着)以来。堀師は「2年前の北海道戦は、調子を崩していてコンディションが戻り切らなかったが、今年はいい状態に戻っている。小回りの2000メートルは距離不足なので、馬場が渋って時計がかかってくれれば、チャンスはある」とコメントした。

title_en: Ontario Commits CA$35M Annually to Equine Industry
description: The Ontario government is increasing support for agriculture and rural jobs across Ontario by contributing an additional CA$35 million annually for the next five years. About 80% goes to support Ontario's breeding sector and racing participants.

title_en: Chaldean Colt Tops NZB National Weanling Sale
description: All of the sale's key metrics increased, with a total aggregate of NZ$3,593,000 for the 102 weanlings sold at Karaka, marking an increase of 49%.

title_en: Siblings to Classic Winners On Offer at Arqana August
description: Siblings to two of this year's French classic winners—Constitution River and Diamond Necklace—are among 325 yearlings consigned for a truly star-studded Arqana August Sale.

title_en: NY Court: No Appeal Over Pletcher's 10-Day Suspension
description: A New York appellate court rules Hall of Fame trainer Todd Pletcher will not be allowed to reargue or appeal its unanimous ruling affirming a 10-day suspension imposed on the trainer by New York stewards.

title_en: Team Munce Eyes Tatt’s Tiara Triumph
description: Chris and Corey Munce look to complete their season with a win in the June 27 Tattersall’s Tiara (G1) at Eagle Farm Racecourse.

title_en: Mott on Baeza: We Want to do Well for Shirreffs' Memory
description: Bill Mott discusses Baeza ahead of his start in the $2 million Stephen Foster Stakes (G1) June 27 at Churchill Downs. The Hall of Famer took over training Baeza this winter after the February death of John Shirreffs.

title_en: Mott: Sovereignty Should Take Step Forward in Foster
description: Hall of Fame trainer Bill Mott discusses 2025 Horse of the Year Sovereignty ahead of his start in the $2 million Stephen Foster Stakes (G1) June 27 at Churchill Downs.

title_en: Northern Stars Turf Festival June 27 at Canterbury
description: Canterbury Park will host its annual Northern Stars Turf Festival June 27 with eight races and a 5:10 p.m. CT start. Five of the races, including four one-mile $50,000 stakes, will be run over the turf course.

title_en: Belleza Latina, Lovely Em Head F-T June Digital Sale
description: Fasig-Tipton has cataloged 283 entries for its June Digital Sale. The five-day virtual sale will offer a diverse lineup of yearlings, racing or breeding prospects, and accomplished broodmares.

title_en: Lynch Team Expect 'Big Performance' from Shred the Gnar
description: Nic Lynch, assistant trainer to his father Brian, highlights the barn's graded runners on Churchill Downs' closing weekend June 27-28: Shred the Gnar, Prize Pick, and Owen Almighty.

title_en: Willy D's Ready for Role as Foster Longshot
description: Following the scratches of Forged Steel and Navajo Warrior, trainer Mike Maker has confirmed that Willy D's will race in the $2 million Stephen Foster Stakes (G1) June 27 at Churchill Downs where he will try to play the role of spoiler.

title_en: North American Record Holder Wolfie's Dynaghost Retires
description: Woodslane Farm's Wolfie's Dynaghost, who in December set a North American record while winning the 1 1/8-mile Fort Lauderdale Stakes (G3T) in 1:43.42 at Gulfstream Park, has been retired from racing.

title_en: Panama Wins Horseshoe Indianapolis Jockey Challenge
description: Team Panama defeats Team Mexico by 14 points to capture its second consecutive title and third win overall in the annual World Jockey Challenge at Horseshoe Indianapolis.

title_en: Japanese Stakes Winner Finger Targets Pacific Classic
description: Finger, a 3-year-old Japanese-bred colt by Three Chimney Farm's marquee stallion Gun Runner, is set to travel to the United States this summer to target the Pacific Classic Stakes (G1) at Del Mar.

title_en: From the Magazine: A Queens Farewell to Aqueduct
description: As Aqueduct Racetrack is set to close, join BloodHorse's New York correspondent Bob Ehalt to reflect on the track's history.

title_en: Fabre Joined on Trainer's License by Daughter Lavinia
description: Champion French trainer Andre Fabre now has his daughter Lavinia on a joint trainer's license.

title_en: TTA Board Approves Two New Stakes for Sales Graduates
description: Texas Thoroughbred Association board of directors approves a pair of new 2-year-old stakes races to be featured at Lone Star Park starting in 2027 for graduates of the two Texas Thoroughbred Association Sales.

title_en: Aqueduct's Closing Weekend Focuses on Fan Involvement
description: In this month's At the Track with Sean Collins: Although there are many sad feelings around Aqueduct Racetrack's closing weekend, the event itself could be a positive for marketing New York racing and the Sept. 18 opening of the new Belmont Park.

title_en: Two New Members Elected to MHBA Board of Directors
description: Three incumbents and two new members have been elected to the Maryland Horse Breeders Association board of directors. The election results were announced June 24.

title_en: Kentucky Goes On Offense Against Prediction Markets
description: With litigation involving prediction markets widespread in the U.S., Kentucky is suddenly at the center of multiple lawsuits involving state and private efforts to prevent those businesses from cutting into the state's licensed gambling market share.

title_en: Lagynos Aims for Five in a Row in Wise Dan
description: Lagynos highlights the the $500,000 Wise Dan Stakes (G2T) June 27 at Churchill Downs.

title_en: Grade 1 Winner Brant to Return in Churchill's Maxfield
description: Brant, one of the standout 2-year-olds of the 2025 season, will try to get his sophomore campaign untracked when he faces an expected seven other 3-year-olds in the $250,000 Maxfield Stakes (G3) June 28 at Churchill Downs.

title_en: Double Market Tops Inglis Australia June (Late) Sale
description: In total, the Inglis Digital Australia June (Late) Sale grossed AU$3,125,450. The sale's second-top lot was 6-year-old mare Takemine, a half sister to Chayan, who sold at this year's Inglis Chairman's Sale for AU$5.6 million.

title_en: BHA Restrictions Lifted on Quarantined Yard
description: Restrictions placed on Mel and Phil Rowley's training yard following the discovery of equine influenza in a vaccinated Thoroughbred at a nearby stable have been lifted.

title_en: Cornucopian Looms Large in Churchill's Bango
description: Seven accomplished males will contest the 6 1/2-furlong Bango Stakes (G3) June 27 at Churchill Downs. Dual grade 3 winner Cornucopian will face multiple graded stakes winner and Breeders' Cup alumnus Dr. Venkman in the sprint event.

title_en: Nitrogen's Summer Campaign Points to Whitney Stakes
description: Following her recent 12 3/4-length win in the Ogden Phipps Stakes (G1), reigning champion 3-year-old filly Nitrogen will set her sights on a highly anticipated clash against males in the Aug. 8 Whitney Stakes (G1) at Saratoga Race Course.

title_en: Forged Steel, Navajo Warrior Will Scratch From Foster
description: Forged Steel and Navajo Warrior, Saffie Joseph Jr.-trained stablemates of White Abarrio, will both scratch from the $2 million Stephen Foster Stakes (G1) June 27 at Churchill Downs.

title_en: A Triple Dead Heat for Jockey of the Week
description: The riding achievements of Jeiron Barbosa, Juan Hernandez, and Irad Ortiz Jr. result in a rare triple dead heat for Jockey of the Week honors June 15-21.

title_en: Bond, NYRA Reach Settlement Over Social Media Post
description: NYRA and trainer Kevin Bond have reached a settlement in the administrative proceeding that followed a racist post to the trainer's Facebook account in December; a post the trainer attributed to his social media account being hacked.

title_en: Iowa Festival of Racing to Have $1.2M in Stakes Purses
description: The signature event of the racing season at Prairie Meadows, the Iowa Festival of Racing, is set for July 10-11, featuring eight stakes races.

title_en: Joliestar May Target July Cup, Return to Ascot in 2027
description: Joliestar is set to contest Newmarket's July Cup (G1) July 11 and to try Royal Ascot again next year after running a brave but agonizing third in the June 20 Queen Elizabeth II Jubilee Stakes (G1).

title_en: Sarayu Becomes First Winner for Sire Collusion Illusion
description: Sarayu breaks her maiden June 20 at Woodbine, becoming freshman sire Collusion Illusion's first winner.

title_en: Social Inclusion Returning to Pennsylvania for 2027
description: Social Inclusion, the grade 1-placed son of Pioneerof the Nile, is returning to Pennsylvania to stand stud in 2027. He will relocate to Bonner Hill Farms near Littlestown, Pa., said Bonner Hill Farms owner Cristina Holmes.

title_en: Coolmore Celebrates 'Iconic' Day for Justify at Ascot
description: Despite being a Triple Crown winner on dirt, Justify strengthened his résumé as a top stallion for European turf races June 18 at Royal Ascot with offspring taking the 2 1/2-mile Gold Cup Stakes (G1) and finishing 1-2 in the 7-furlong Chesham Stakes.

title_en: Kentucky-Bred Scandinavia Edges Trawlerman in Gold Cup
description: Kentucky-bred Scandinavia provided trainer Aidan O'Brien with his 100th winner at Royal Ascot by edging out defending winner Trawlerman in the final strides of a scintillating Gold Cup Stakes (G1) June 18 at Ascot Racecourse.

title_en: Bernick's Nola Soul Lands Royal Ascot's Chesham Stakes
description: Owner Craig Bernick, president of Glen Hill Farm, secured a stakes victory at Royal Ascot June 18 when Nola Soul, a son of Justify, finished well to post a victory over another son of Justify in the Chesham Stakes for 2-year-olds.

title_en: Known Agenda Sold to New Farm in Uruguay
description: The grade 1-winning son of Curlin has been purchased by Haras La Peregrina in Maldonado.

title_en: International Pedigrees Up Front in American Stakes
description: In this week's Porter on Pedigrees, we take a look at the international bloodlines of Dona Clota and Gimme a Nother, who each scored in grade 3s run June 13 in North America.

title_en: Debut runner Book Value Is Mandaloun's First Winner
description: Book Value, bred and trainer by Robert Gorham and owned by Marion Gorham, wins his racing debut June 16 at Thistledown by 3 3/4 lengths.

title_en: Known Agenda Sires First Stakes Winner With Squad Goals
description: Squad Goals wins the Tom Ridge Stakes by 1 1/2 lengths June 15 at Presque Isle Downs.

title_en: Triple Crown Shows Top Stallion Honors Far From Settled
description: This week's edition of The List looks at the race for top stallion honors after the Triple Crown.

title_en: Mendelssohn Gets His 50th Black-Type Stakes Winner
description: Hark Theangelssing, a 3-year-old daughter of Mendelssohn, became her sire's 50th black-type stakes winner June 14, conquering the Stormy Blues Stakes at Laurel Park.

title_en: Mitts Is First Winner for Gretzky the Great
description: Mitts, in his second career start, is placed first by disqualification giving his sire Gretzky the Great his initial winner in a 2-year-old maiden special weight race June 13 at Gulfstream Park.

title_en: Harper's Corner Is First Winner for Speaker's Corner
description: The filly wins her racing debut June 12 in a 5-furlong maiden special weight at Laurel Park. Harper's Corner is owned by Charles Biggs and trained by Cathal Lynch.

title_en: Techwerkian Sails to Become Olympiad's First Winner
description: Techwerkian wins a 4 1/2-furlong, main-track maiden special weight gate to wire by 1 1/4 lengths June 12 at Belterra Park.

title_en: Sharp-Eyed Horseman John Greathouse Jr. Dies at 82
description: John Greathouse Jr. helped his family-owned and -operated Glencrest Farm see success at the highest level.

title_en: White Abarrio to Enter Stud in 2027 at Gainesway
description: White Abarrio, winner of the 2023 Breeders' Cup Classic (G1) and earner of more than $8.4 million, will enter stud at Gainesway in 2027, according to a social media post June 11 by co-owner C2 Racing Stable.

description: Curtis and Beth Harrell have reopened a historic 370-acre farm, formerly the site of Bonne Chance Farm, as a boutique boarding operation for broodmares under the management of John Durr.
